summary: Recovery is ready enough for normal training; keep intensity honest if stress rises. Acute load is close to chronic load; keep the next hard session conditional on HRV/RHR.
actions: Recovery is ready enough for normal training; keep intensity honest if stress rises.
Sleep performance is in range; maintain the current sleep window before increasing load.
